name: sketched
description: Sketched is Chalked through time: a witnessed video stage where agents propose time-indexed layer mutations and the human holds authority.

scripts.content:check: npm run contribution:check && npm run epistemology:check && npm run imagination:check && npm run fabricpc:package:check && npm run voice:check && npm run video:check && npm run book:check && npm run book:test && npm run book5:lean && npm run ps:source:check && npm run ps:flattening:check && npm run ps:frontier:check && npm run ps:bindings:check && npm run ps:bindings:audit
scripts.dev: npm run contribution:check && npm run book:ledger && npm run book:glossary && npm run book:project && npm run book5:lean && vite
scripts.build: npm run contribution:check && npm run epistemology:check && npm run imagination:check && npm run fabricpc:package:check && npm run voice:check && npm run video:check && npm run book:ledger && npm run book:glossary && npm run book:project && npm run book5:lean && tsc -b && vite build
scripts.test: npm run content:check && npm run test:app

author: Paul Carver Tiffany III
